auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Recall.ai API key used with the Authorization Token header. Create it from your regional Recall dashboard API Keys page and use the same region where you created the key.

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: Recall.ai region for this workspace, such as us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-central-1, or ap-northeast-1.

actions.name: create_bot
actions.description: Create a Recall.ai bot with the core scheduling, recording, automatic-leave, and metadata fields needed for a first-pass meeting bot workflow.

meeting_url.description: The meeting URL that Recall.ai should join, such as a Google Meet or Zoom link.

bot_name.description: The bot display name shown in the meeting when the platform allows custom names.

join_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp for scheduling the bot at least 10 minutes in the future.

recording_config.description: Optional Recall.ai recording_config object for transcript, media, and recording behavior.

automatic_leave.description: Optional Recall.ai automatic_leave object that controls when the bot should leave the meeting.

metadata.description: String metadata entries passed to or returned by Recall.ai.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Recall.ai bot.

bot.description: Raw Recall.ai bot payload returned by Recall.ai.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the create_bot action.

actions.name: delete_bot_media
actions.description: Delete the Recall.ai media artifacts stored for a completed bot after downstream processing is finished.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Recall.ai bot's stored media.

anyOf.description: Raw Recall.ai bot payload returned by Recall.ai.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the delete_bot_media action.

actions.name: get_bot
actions.description: Retrieve one Recall.ai bot by bot ID, including its current status changes, recordings, and metadata.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Recall.ai bot.

bot.description: Raw Recall.ai bot payload returned by Recall.ai.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the get_bot action.

actions.name: list_bots
actions.description: List Recall.ai bots with optional filters for scheduled date window, meeting URL, platform, status, metadata, and pagination.

join_at_after.description: Only include bots scheduled on or after this YYYY-MM-DD date.

join_at_before.description: Only include bots scheduled on or before this YYYY-MM-DD date.

meeting_url.description: Only include bots for the given meeting URL.

items.description: The meeting platform filter accepted by Recall.ai.

platform.description: Optional list of Recall.ai platform filters.

items.description: The Recall.ai bot status filter value.

status.description: Optional list of Recall.ai bot status filters.

use_cursor.description: When present, ask Recall.ai to use cursor-based pagination semantics.

metadata.description: String metadata entries passed to or returned by Recall.ai.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Recall.ai bots.

anyOf.description: The total bot count returned by Recall.ai.
The next page URL returned by Recall.ai.
The previous page URL returned by Recall.ai.

items.description: Raw Recall.ai bot payload returned by Recall.ai.

bots.description: The bot results returned by Recall.ai.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the list_bots action.

actions.name: remove_bot_from_call
actions.description: Remove a Recall.ai bot from the meeting immediately when it is already active in the call.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing one Recall.ai bot from a call.

anyOf.description: Raw Recall.ai bot payload returned by Recall.ai.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload for the remove_bot_from_call action.
